title: [WIP] Depth recurrence + BitLinear compression approach
author: Jenja-N

data.description: Single transformer block iterated multiple times with shared weights and a learnable iteration embedding.
Aggressive tying across attention and FFN weights to reduce parameter count.
BitLinear compression approach using ±1 weights with fp16 scale.

novel_contributions: Single transformer block iterated 12 times with shared weights
Learnable iteration embedding for depth recurrence
Aggressive weight tying across attention and FFN
